name: TARGETPAIR_WITH_MAX_ASSIGNEE_DIVERSITY
description: Target pair with largest number of distinct assignees.
cypher: MATCH (tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee) RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT a) AS assignee_count, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY assignee_count DESC, patent_count DESC, target_pair LIMIT 1;
